params.name: The Scream
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On May 10, 1893, Edvard Munch created this pioneering expressionism artwork. "The Scream" was a painting created by Munch when he was in depression. This piece features a distorted human which depicts anxiety and fear. It expressed the idea that anxiety and loneliness can be erased by a loud scream. The colors used by Munch were nor irregular yet not the painting carries elements of exaggeration, making it an iconic piece of expressionism. [Basic Info] Type: Oil Painting
Collected by: Nat …
